posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
(we should perhaps talk on the subject of) carbon-jelly
[ location: maidenHead ]


surprise surprise
thumbs up everyone
will score at least once
like when I was dirty and you laughed
flip it over on a dirty brown bowl
where did they go? damn I miss their laugh
it's June at last - we are stranded 
but heaven bound 
with killer whales
it's June at last - and we will soon walk 
the twins in the park
ripped a page off the book of life 
folded eight times made a ladder to the moon
from where I watch hazel dance slow
haze slow havel
surprise surprise
wait here everyone
will score eventually

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
dance lesson #1
[ location: @office ]


how do i stay relevant : under the strobe light?
on a mat of nails : jumping on one foot : on a slow slow dance : with my baby?
no one has noticed but : my trade is filling me with pain : your dance is filling me with sorrow
i wanna live to be 100 : but i wanna live at 100 : out of the shadows : and into the light the heat
i wanna live and travel : with my baby
no one has noticed but : your ghost is filling me with pain : my fate is filling me with sorrow
( got a break today : i got back to the planet : with both feet, stable )
( i know i am no longer : as special in this house : as last week )

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
At the moose farm with Robert
[ location : @ mooseFarm ]


We never met after the christening : We exchanged letters 
and dragonflies : I save them all and called it a book : 
With songs and drawings of cadillacs
I chose to drive : And didn't remember to play : 
Neither did he : And that I still regret : 
And the sacrifices she made on my behalf
Miles apart like the married girl : 
Never to shoot up into a sky : And land onto the same earth : 
We were supposed to win...
He chose earth : And didn't remember to pray : 
Neither did I : And that he never regrets : 
And the sacrifices he made on my behalf

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
everyone's not dead
[ location : the ice bar ]


Remember this, we will all be ash one day (Memento mori)
Even if the church decides we ARE always (Santo Subito)
Dad wanted me to learn latin : But Moldavia came back very late
And added a lot of drama : to the unfolding
It went like this
The first half ended with a kiss : On my first love's cheek :
Some 30 years too late : She cried and asked me to marry her :
We didn't and we never will...
You the unbeatable memento guy : Memento mori : Remember Parsifal?
The second with a plane crash : But everyone's not dead :
Like Parsifal, and he told me : He had his sleep turned into an unrest :
Woke up I think, then slept again (unusual) : And the dream continued...
It had lots of things in it : But one of the best parts :
Was watching a band playing : Covers of your song : In a different tempo...
And the church made you a saint : Santo Subito : Before your time

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
everyone's dead
[ location: odenPlan ]


VAST TURING MACHINE:
One one two
One two one two
One on two too
Splash rash echo
Louder Roche
Ocher skeleton warhorse
Here she comes, riding
PROJETO JARI:
Planted with palm trees
They kill everyone
Everyone is dead
except for the Russians
playing Greensleeves
Down in a tunnel
SIAMESE:
Silly woman you
Don't need 3 umbrellas
Enrage the ripper in me
Scrawl
Then link airways
Mate
Then Mandate
TWO ONE ONE
TWO IN ONE ARE ONE
WE ARE ALL DEAD

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
The Bicycle Girl Revisited
[ location: hbvu ]


Not long ago : two people saw the devil : 20 minutes later, one of them was gone.
Unclothed, dragged from her car by the hair : Wrapped up in plastic.
I have never seen a woman like her : Cycling down the beach front : Before
Let's now celebrate Armageddon : Or televangelism
I already said I saw the devil : When she was arrested in NYC
For possessing a graffiti instrument (a paint marker)
I have never seen a woman like her : Cycling down the beach front : Again
Let's not waste anymore time : Wasting time has been our point : Long enough

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
jack bauer curry house
i wanna be deleted, stagnate : control alt oh oh oh (percussion solo now ...)
la la laa : i need coffee and novacaine : you need catfood, any preferred brand (i knew it)
i am in the mood for something bad : crank it up go for it :
aren't we great : when driving our minibus : with tourists to the town centre :
my mother takes care of us : o so well
back at the heath (great place) : they had some good places for a beer : and meeting girlies :
i had a girlfriend there (really cute) : evil parents though : parents were loaded :
she was studying to be a cleaner : i remember, she gave you fever : dengue fever
she wasn't bad in the back seat : of my 1978 polo either : added offense to injury :
you jealous of Fanny Magnetz (gotta love 'em) : when they go vroom vroom :
well, on a student budget : it is a polo or a 2cv : do i need to split the money?(i had both)
but the elastic bands broke on one of them : annoying like hell : hit the mill : run for the hils

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
henry's viruses
it's amazing how i was one click away : from becoming a millionaire :
amazed by how fast it took off : it felt as if i could get more whacks :
whacked on a tuesday in 1967
through out my day those days : i worked repairing church organs :
with asthmatic passionate postmen : i didn't realize when i started :
how easy it would have been
you hardly ever talk about chance : lost in the parade, touching my knees :
how you could you walk away from me : all i wanted to do was you but you :
you died on a tuesday in 1967

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
this city is mine
[nichteroy]
got home before the rain
me and a mob wandering the streets
like i did when i was more of a child
here
gosh, i miss the way things werethings like just hit the streets
meet people
laugh a little almost all night
there
this city
used to be the best city in the world
(to me at least)
today she showed me
she still has the old charm
today she was sunny,
but happily windy
with clouds covering the sun
a little
refreshing
people getting ready
to turn this year's page
[france]
i wish summer was like this
don't you?
this city
used to be the best city in the world
(to me at least)
today she showed me
she still has the old charm

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
strawberries
I love how she gets so proud of herself
when she drops her toys in front of me.
She loves to play fetch
I just don't get it
Still wondering whys and hows
She creates these colorful dreams
pouring down from this big tap
like water
Then I threw, and she vanished
To the other side,
I can't find her now
I just don't get it
Everything is going to be alright,
I think
Eyes closed picturing her hair in the sun
pouring down from this big tap
like water
feet....feed me...fed
feet....feed me...fed
My own hair is thinning
For ages,
I have been aging fast lately
Dreaming of a better place
I look for her in these empty streets
Full of blackness,
silence and memories to erase
pouring down from this big tap
like water
the whys the hows
the thens the nows
the screams on every street
the silence of our frozen feet
feet....feed me...fed
feet....feed me...fed

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
stephen says
              [roky erickson]
sometimes we're tired
and it shows on our shoes too
sometimes...
then we danced the elevator
with the greybearded man
so lost, now seventy one
forced to work the nightshift
sometimes...
told to jumped the bridge
parachuted
burned it instead with napalm
laughing at the kids
queuing to get in the bierhall
did you see it too?
the maidenred lad laid staticb
urnt by the same napalm
bring me feedback
bring me whiteskies
yes bring me bring me
napalm
sometimes...

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
more of the same
we weep, alone - monsoons don't kill people, people do
b4 the quake there was romancethen more romance then tears
we hoped it would last (but it didn't)...
we sweep, backwards - romances don't kill people, monsters do
after the quake there were wavesmore waves and then debris
we hoped it would pass (and it did)...
we sleep, awake - silence doesn't kill people, videogames do
i am earplugging myself with hollywatching swedish filmsabout buildings, collapsingin black and white and shades of pink
i am awake, but i am alone
i am alone, and i am awake

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
superglue
the romeo ran from the rain : overcoat soaked, got shelter : inside the greyhound a pound for a pound : heavy pounding heart
later that night : the sleep finally unlocked : old images of people long gone in his heart she found : the opposite of dismay
romeo won't you forgive : juliet : she knows not what she does : she listens to music : while living in a shoe

the juliet runs from the mirror : face wrinkled, soul searching : inside the greyhound my soul feels so smooth : heavy pulsing soul
later that night : the pills stopped working : all this friction in her shoes in her soul he found : the opposite of illusion
juliet won't you forgive : romeo : he knows not what he does : he listens to music : while dancing in the rain

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
Jot Dedduh
Oh! I am in confused : I am obsessed : With a boozing nutter : Eating hazelnuts
Damned be my enemies : I will love them all : Once I sober up
I'll stick out of for them : Rude toad, crushed by a bus : Flat on the dirty road...
While chewing on this charade : The crowd cheers : Hail to the King! Hail to the King!
And so we got all that smoke : Softly bringing drunkness back :
To the unwashed, the unsafe, the elegantly obese
All of us in the room : At once cheer : Hail to the King! Hail to the King!
You are all so boyish : Outcasts-adoring jet engines :
Help me save the topless girl : From page three : she could become : A friend for life
All my friends all at once : Join me in a cheer : Hail to the King! Hail to the King!

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
empty rooms 


the little boy thought he was super
asleep in a cradle, credulous
unable to sleep most nights
thinking of riffles and bridles
paddle ! now fight !
(it was that simple really)
the little boy flexed his muscles
and wrote a mental note
maybe it's time to go home now
the mouse was very very little
and the monkey in the middle
didn't like the way he was
they needed mom to settle
the punches they threw
fight ! now paddle !
(it was that simple really)
the little robot showed its teeth
it wrote a mental note
not to die again soon

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
pubcrawl
this is me, on a crash course to oblivion
a bullet (with my name on it) awaits
around the next corner
the beauty queen, she holds the pistol
and winks, "i am unarmed"
 stardom in croydon that's what we've got
and a criminal record
today we've got income
and it comes from prostitution
we've got options
i am back in school learning
to repeat the same mistakes again
 stardom in croydon that's what we've got
and mighty good weather
today we've got a sinking boat
a pirate boat
we've got a private sail boat
and in sailing
we repeat
the same mistakes
again

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
Election Week

Your mule is headless
Tonight I will find another way
Before the midnight train
The one out of Odenplan
Leaves for Babel
Last night it was
The Belarus circus troupe
In horned helmets
Peforming on the empty platform
Loyalty they had none
Or a place to crash
me, I should get into politics
heard you are retiring
Repenting of petty crimes
Putting up an extra round
For us
me, I will get into politics

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
we, turned into glass
[location: Point Reyes]
Baby got a citation to appear
in Santa Barbara
a week from today
As if she was a celeb

I can see through her things
Everything is made of glass

The president girl married
And the drunk driver got released
The prisons are overcrowded
they say Azazi must remain locked

I can see through people
Everyone is made of glass

Inmates on the run in Arizona
They blamed it on 
the quality of the food
Overcrowding
Not a bad thing

I can see through his things
Everything he made is glass

Forest fire in Tamoles
It is all dry and yellow
Karachi, she needs relief
(Gimme more of your magic relief
i can't got enough of it)

How much is enough?
When is a little more enough?

California beaches are open
Some think the thick black sea
Should be a roadside attraction
(with signs on the freeway)

How much is never enough?
When is a little more than enough?

Like those giant red trees
Of 12 plus years ago
He is no longer travelling
in moms belly no more

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
El Blanko Krinko (ego, streamed)

Your soul ADORNS me
AVIDLY
The BOOST ENDs WITH A SPALL
While the radio plays
Modern Warfare
The OBOIST dings again
For the seventh time
Some NUDIST girl dreams of TWEED
Screams "come on come on now touch me baby"
Crawl thy lizard Victoria
I SIN
Dusting your HEAT from my HEAD
MATTED TAME
We mate in the dark
here comes the boys
from the oak woods
Let us WRITE christmas CAROLS 
in july Caroline
Meanwhile the PA in the airport 
ANNOUNCING
code ELEVEN code 11 !
But it is a FRAUD
So we made HOME in the end
"For you and I"

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
ayuntamiento de albacete

It happened at Adelson, 363
Irene contemplating surgery tools
Slicing art to spate
sin the poppy ray 
promising visions of a party big
shaking hips upon slivering ground
fluting
she closed the curtains
splashing and soughing
air shawls, ghosts

promising visions of a big party
shaking hips upon slivering ground

i never left in a turmoil
skimpier and alarmed
cataleptic, shivering
as if receiving spirits

promising visions of THE big party
shaking hips upon slivering ground

yes i have evidence
and i almost believed Irene
(was Irene really her name?)

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
orphans


i found you
room preening
being half religious
the day the fishwasher
flooded the house
we couldn't do the dishes
for days

though it looks a lot more like
we have at last lost our way
"scusi scusi i castrati sono morti"

Nauen, she could have paid
the annuity for burglary
doing schedule at the funnel
listen carefully
it is the chords
the accords, the continuum
ladyship courtship
all over the lawn

though it looks a lot more like
we have at last lost our way
"scusi scusi i castrati sono morti"

posts.title: Macao can't help it
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
Everyone in the room stop and hear this:
There is oil everywhere
From where I stand, things do not look good
Only blurred fragments of a black horizon

I need new habits, for sure
I am not watching TV for a week
It's never enough no
To sin is my birth right

I love TV, she tells me - the heron
And the sea lion !
We still need to drive our cars to work
In the morning

My old friend woke up late
And missed the start of the end of the world

I am in shock -
Macao just fucking blew up!
Macanese, may you be blessed with calm winds.

I love TV, she never lies to me - save the children
Drowning at sea !
We still need children to wake us up
In the morning

There is no getting better;
Children and monkeys, in procession
Looting, blowing windows

There are no gods in Macao
(As far as I can tell you)

posts.title: A Day in the Life
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
New Budget, Hay Fever, World Cup, Annual Review. 
Sciatic pain, Static brain. 
Gall Bladder Stones, (I prefer The Beatles) Screaming, Remind me baby of you. 
OCD. 
Strep Son, Step Son, Stepping on my son, (I love my sons). 
Healing from chicken pox, Healing the chicken, Releasing the chicken, From the food factory.  
Spring cleaning, Recruiting and Training, New volunteers, You give me inspiration, And 1 million conspiracy theories, In-between lines, 
That even include my rubber duck in the bath, 
In-between the sheets, And the label of my whiskey bottle. 
Look for me in May When good ol' British Summer is over.

posts.title: David's in Portland
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
David is in in town
Portland, the one in the east
my brother just moved to Portland
i never knew i had a half brother
until 4 years back

two years can sometimes feels like three
or four - ever

i haven't listen to music lately
and i miss it
i miss David too
David he was born out of summer love
he is one year older than me

strange things happened when
we were not careful
four years ago
when we found each other
and David again

two years can sometimes feels like three
or four - ever

David he came up north and
simply knocked on my door
before he split from his wife and kids
and moved to Portland

i may catch the next plane
to Portland
and go see Pavid
before it is four years again

posts.title: new women from guatemala
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
bare bear seeds leave
girl she left through the back door
of the tapas bar
left me with the bill
and an empty heart

against my will
oh no she never will

the TV news ticking
freya died age 98
while in guatemala
a sinkhole ate a factory
and telephone poles

zebra zebra feel the cement
or rocks
with cement or rocks
we closed the back door
she will never leave me again

against my will
oh no she never will

posts.title: the wreck of nobody's dog (tracking the cancellations)
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
i was trying so hard to make it
kept going for years
with a pile of yellow gig fliers
(and everything else that came in the mail)

monica staying with me,
imagining summer and cloudless skies
yes I'll take the money if I need to
yes this really has crossed my mind

ash accumulating
we went outside
it covered the grass gray
we smoked it as fast as we could

monica staying with me,
imagining summer and cloudless skies
yes we needed the money so i took it too
yes i really never got caught

call us
leave a voice message after the bip the blip
i'm leaving monica at last
putting her peasant head
in the aquarium
to keep the fish company

this is what i did after i left:
i spent all my money
on a boatfull of hands
on a handfull of boats

did you grow up to be someone? - this is a cosmic farce
did you grow up to be someone? - the eight-shaped universe
did you grow up to be someone? - in the art book
did you grow up to be someone? - monica gave me for passover

(no trace has ever been found
of us back then when we were young)

posts.title: second conversation with margot lange
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
my heart got broken at the memory motel
i should have drunk more not shy away
form justified kisses in elevator halls

foggy mirrors separate rooms double bills
roses spinning bottles telling lies
and i shouted "dear god" she does believe
in you and me but not us

i miss you dearly when i am drunk

now you are married to the third man
and happy i heard or hope
what happened to your soldier boy?
we are not talking anymore so i imagine

foggy rooms double mirrors separate bills
empty bottles spinning roses telling lies
and i shout "dear god" i don't believe
in anything anymore

posts.title: nach:lied (nsc2)
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
easter is not good for ducks
nope, but it's getting warmer
and the snow is gone
just in time for king's birthday
the king? yes, both of them

San José - Karl's Crown
San José - Karl's Crown .......
how can there be a choice?

one thing i am sure of:
i am not sixteen again anymore
[choice is everything]
[i choose nothing]

what am i doing in the madhouse?
talking to a duck
i'd rather be walking on my own...
you'll be amazed how far you can walk
just listen and walk!
the king was born a hippie in san josé
I work within a cloud ...
cloud 9, san josé's umbrella

san josé - kings crown
sans josé - karl's crown .......
how can there be a choice?

one thing i am sure of:
i am not sixteen again anymore
[choice is everything]
[i choose nothing]

nach:lied (nsc 2) by fate2

posts.title: Bob Marshall Blues (On the route of the 197th bus)
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
16:00 197 bus, the woman with the pink hair, the obese teenager eating fried chicken and chips, the drunk couple exchanging insults with the huge doorman at the back and the girl in leggings completely embroided with sequins shouting on her mobile all stared at the boy who all of a sudden decided to gently rock back and forth, no wonder, what a strange thing to do of course.

Bob Marshall You ain't never get my vote
Bob Marshall You are going to hell

If you work hard and they don't notice, work harder. If you sing softly and they are laughing, sing louder. If you are too tired to go on, go under, but keep going. If you are to hurt to carry on, carry under, but carry everyone. If you're too hurt to hurt, hurt stronger, until your pain and yourself become one and the sheer challenge of your living becomes your joy.

Bob Marshall You ain't never get my vote
Bob Marshall You are going to hell

posts.title: the opposite of julie
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
from my window i watch
the morning sun as she sunbathes
the skin sheds, she breaks out
darker this time, i swear

come here wake me up
i wait, i can't wait
back home they are getting up
ready to leave, like julie did

stop pretending you don't know
the world is in love with you
if you dress in red, pour the cofeee
julie, it is pouring outside

i am guilty i am guilty
of whatever whenevermore
more more of the same same
insane with anxiety, for sunday to come

julie would you please bring home the gold

come sunday come
i wait, i can't wait
for the cold to start
julie leaves to warm herself up

julie would you please bring home the cold

posts.title: Jordan
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
Jordan has her skin like a gold mine
Burnt and Young I'm Burnt I'm Old She's Young
Jordan took my heart away from its cold box
She's watching it melt

Guanabara Guanabara your soul's with me
Burnt and Young I'm Burnt You're Old I'm Gone
Guanabara Guanabara you light's off
I'm watching you sleep

Jordan used to drink
Dream and Drive and Dance
Dance and Dream and Dive
Out of my life

Guanabara Guanabara vem
Guanabara Guanabara vai
Guanabara quem
Vai me buscar?

Jordan knows who's gonna wash me back
The beach the surf the salt
And every beat of her heart

Guanabara Guanabara vai
Ninguem foi me buscar
Guanabara Guanabara ninguem vem

posts.title: nunca mas
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
Saw this barefoot person in this very long white dress with a rainbow, a butterfly and a ladybug.
He said I should look at the sky, make a wish, scream my heart out and it would come true.
When I think of it, he looked a lot like the fisherman, saying weird things like that.
I screamed you out of my heart.
Sometimes it is not bad at all to miss a train.
Sometimes it is not bad at all to miss it again.
I know it in my heart, I know You are right.
Last time I saw a ladybug I was waiting for a train and I made a wish that will never come true.
She followed us into the train, or so You say, I didn't see her.
And as we were picnicking and being young again I was hoping we would talk, we never did.
I am not sure anymore we have ever done it.
Sometimes it is not bad at all to miss a train.
Sometimes it is not bad at all to miss it again.
You know it in your heart, You know I am wrong.

posts.title: redmond song
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
this is an interment - in the rain
umbrellas, open and close
like forest black
five stars for fifty cents
the roof is full of stars !
the floor is full of cents !
tell me my name
in three little words
cause i forgot
to be born again
inspiration is aloof
hard it is to accept

the eye could not keep up
with our memories
of things that never happened
au revoir pretty
thanks for never letting me know you
what else is there to say?

posts.title: bringing it all in
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
take one. tudo distorcido. caramba....
[recuerdo]

posts.title: boy song
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
there is a rumor in my hood
the future is going to be awesome
and rulers will be things that measure stuff
only

this guy was confused
because all the women had perfume
so he made a random excuse
and left

my eyes are red
red like ruby
rubies are shinny
and her pupils are not in the middle of her eye
she is crosseyed
from looking so hard at the rubies

i am going to abuse the rythmmac-thing thinggie
my burger was defective
i am going to abuse the rythmmac-thing thinggie
my soda was defective

posts.title: your wish is my command
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
i asked joy why her shadow got wet
wandering in the rain i was, she said
the flesh awakes and the heart beats and beats
for two eternities

i dont know where joy is right now
anymore


joy promised me she would
be my trouble, my one and only
the one i trusted with my life

do break my heart and be the beat
the beat the pulse
of my night every other night

follow me joy

let us be prisoners
in the hot belly of a big whale
speaking not, feeling less
we will light a fire with our sorrows
tired and dirty dressed in our wet rags
we will laugh and remember

remember this and
one day we will celebrate

joy she never misses me these days
anymore

posts.title: You, Me and The DareDevil #500
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
seems like i have wasted a lot of time
watching the pupae, adrift.
(seems unethical,
i am so done)

can't remember where we were
only that we went down naked
dark surrounding one of us boys
shouting: "go throb, and ask less"

the needs, the wants, the must-haves
just give me all that is mine
and i am gone

cant remember when to sleep
so i dream, this is what i dream:
on the top shelf, a little porcelain head
dreadlocked. with cravats.
closed eyes of Karajan dreaming of Ludwig van
falls, shatters on the hardwood floors.

(it means nothing to me
does it mean anything to you?)

seems like we have a lot to catch up
i am confused so confused
are fridge magnets more meaningful?
stop shouting "go throb, and ask less"

the greeds, the rants, the must-splits
just give me all i don't deserve
and i am gone

posts.title: Semana Santa
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
pay attention to me now
had you not also felt it on your forehead?
disagree don't care,
i've been waiting for you
to be back
are you not back yet
from feasting with the lions?

are you still lost?
amid the dust
far away from any sea
far away from any mountain

Sounds like it'll be lots of fun
so when you stop
(because you'll need to rest)
in the shadows of the ruins
ask your girl to point at the cathedral
and shoot
(make sure it gets published for the world to see)

it all seemed so easy
looking down at the bottom of the cliff
everything you needed
seems to just lay there waiting
to get lost

are you still bleeding?
amid the dust
far away from any sea
far away from any mountain

posts.title: song for a married girl (part two)
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
it is all over the news: "heaven is a myth"
(i know, you are an angel but you never let anybody see you for what you are)

anyways, to prove everyone wrong i had to write this one last song

there is a line in it that goes "my angel was a DEVIL before"
you are someone else's angel, you will never be my angel
(and i almost gave you all that matters in my life)

for whatever reason your reasons or any other good or bad
i never thought reason had anything to do with you and me (or her or him)

anyways, to prove myself strong i need to write this one last song

sitting in your couch, the phone calls with one look i am gone
from the dream couch, the red couch (like your eyes in every picture everyone of them fifty-four)
i am not even half-strong as you are

anyways, to prove you wrong i need to write this one last song

i wanted you so much i started to imagine things
and all i heard you say and do now i know, they were only in my head.

for whatever reason your reasons or any other good or bad
i never thought reason had anything to do with you and me (or her or him)

posts.title: the reason we will never let you go
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
is here...
well, it has also been here for over a year....





PS
you are a fucking genius.
and now all of a sudden i feel the weight of a wasted dream.
DS

posts.title: hard
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
if this is gonna end this way
i'll hoard, she'll shout
we'll meet in monmouth
every other full moon
...bring it

and as we tend our love
the thistle starts to fade
...bring it all in



hush she says
our moon shall always gloss
... bring it all in, we're at the gallow's party

if this is the way it's gonna end
i'll fall, she'll laugh
we'll be free from dualism
...take it

and as we reinvent our love
the thorns start to shred
...take it all back

hush she says
our roses will always scent
...take it all back, we're at the gallow's party

posts.title: granted
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
i guess i never meant
to leave it all behind
to let it slip through my fingers
like your hair, like white sand

it just happened....

i guess we did make
too many wrong turns
and they took us from here to nowhere
and back before we left

that is how i remember it

i guess i never meant
to plagiarize our life
nor change it to the point
of not knowing whose life
we were living
when it all began

it just happened....

i look back in despair
i do not want to look
elsewhere - anymore

you look back in hope
i do not have to look
elsewhere - anymore

this is not how it happened,
i just remember it that way

posts.title: Steeldust (Xingu)
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
The future...


I did it myself, with rusty kitchen scissors

Chained newspaper dolls

An accordion of people

In someone else's life

Dancing, holding hands


No this isn't true, it was only me, standing

Alone


Taking my shoes off, kneeling on gravel

Looking at the stars

Disoriented, still seeking

Thinking that the sky still held

Mainly a map of me


No this isn't true, it was only me, sleeping

Awake


Driving pass the house where it all started

The piano tinkling slightly off tune

Whistling, she grabbed a marker

To catalog the birthmarks on my chest

On my back and on my head


No this isn't true, it was only me, waving

Goodbye


[birthplace]

posts.title: Sarabande
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
intriguing
shinny, sharpened blades
you cried out
grunted from the gut
inside my idea of you
...
sculptures
and the venom on the chisel
invisible cupids
I dreamed for you
...
seductions
drunken love
stupor and the bottles
emptied by you
...
sin
and you turned killer
killing of jealousy
the dreamers of you
...
and finally, dances
wrong sad waltzes
steps that took me
away from you

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
Someone forgot the tap opened In the bathroom and the water never stopped running
Flood
Soon all the courts were drowning
I went walking down shoot up hill, unaware of the end of the world, I was thinking about my dirty socks or when would I comb my hair
One week had passed since I had last spoken to anyone but through a machine a talking machine open skies red skies
Flood
Ah shoot up hill you have turned into a waterfall
I felt well we were alone but no i had one umbrella and we did not care about the rain or the salt we are the salt of the earth
My soul is shallow it will drown the hill and the last mountain

posts.title: Concrete Mix
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
There are many reasons for crying
I believe people cry when they feel sorry for themselves
I think that people who cry out loud are using tears as bullets
Someone once told me that
That someone was so sure
She told me in a laugh and it meant
A lot
But we could never figured out what

Let's stop crying for a minute
And pretend we are having a good laugh

There are many reasons for lying
I believe people lie when they are tired of themselves
History is funny in a way that is always false
Entirely written by the winner.
One should always read history books as story books.
That's what I do
A lot

Let's stop lying for a minute
And pretend we are having a good life

posts.title: One of 37
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
Got delayed on my way again
Because of this light that's stuck in yellow
In a small car surrounded by tanks and fumes
Single drivers everywhere
Pushing, acting like queens
Lover, tell the world what to do tomorrow
Because somewhere today's already gone
Gather a thousand stray dogs
In a sledge - to take us where we need not to be
Teach me to act, over-react, overthrow puppeteers
Dictators in uniform, Uberalles, Up-setters
Teach me to upset, game-set-match
(Back home I would be probably cleaning toilets)
Lover, Show me when it's time to really go
Tell me that you'll miss me when I'm gone

posts.title: i used to call you syd
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
save me don't come for me
once twice life larger than art
you you you not me
this time, yet again
a building collapsed
a skeleton in twisted metal
shouts, jumps off the stage
you you you not me
bounce; looks me in the eye
zoom out; fade out; full screen; live
in contact, with contrast
you you you not me
still looking for a voice
but not mine
thin slice of life, used well
well....
welcome, come back, come back
you you you alone
against the night
good night

posts.title: jack deSantis iPod
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
sleepworking is doing you no good, the sound coming from your heart is acrid - as the venom you pour into our ears; there are so many holes in your story you may not make it to the end of april
it takes seconds, minutes, trillions of dollars to live the life you want you wanna live a life of danger, i wanna live the love of a stranger - there is so little romance in my life...
then i chose the name of my firstborn, and left for a day of sleeping; your labor is doing you no good - there are so many holes in your story you may not make it to the shore or the next empty bed
it takes seconds, minutes, trillions of dollars to live the glory you want
i wanna live a life of an angel; an orange and an angel - nothing rhymes with the life i live

posts.title: Celebrity Deathmatch 2010
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
Osorio
Cremilson Flavinho Belisario Ubirajara
Samaritano Telo Competencia
Seminario ou Capetinha Sanatorio e Balduino
Chumbao
Chato Cri-Cri Pernilongo Joelso
Olandes Listrado Resembrink Pianista
Roxildinho Goiaba

posts.title: A Motel is Not a Home
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
yesterday, anything would have reminded me of you
i could not sleep last night and went outside to count stars
the damn sky was only clouds
the only thing left to do was turn the radio on
[ and putting Margot to sleep with silent lullabies ]

see, i live in a motel (every so often)

i suspected my neighbor is a stalker
so I needed to keep quiet: no TV, no radio music
the only thing left to do was reading about spiders

see, i think i wanna go home now

yesterday, anything you sang would have made me sleep
i could not sleep last night and went outside to count stars
Margot owns real state in the sky
she gave me the one I asked for
[ she also gave Clooney to a girlfriend ]

see, i live in a motel (every other week)

a motel is not a home when a stalker
lives there, next door
bringing drinks and spicy food
and sneaking dirty notes on used napkins under my door
In memorian - at my house i have no shackles
[ Arthur Lee (musician) (1945-2006), American psychedelic-rock musician ]

posts.title: Purple Jellybeans
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
we share a place to get rid of our honestly earned money; but o lord don't we buy very different things?

things like 50 purple boxes, boxes to keep bunches of my fallen hair and tiny tiny fallen pieces of your fallen soul.
i bought smoke and mirrors and i'm not sure what to do with them

things like 50 purple boxes, boxes to put wishes, long forgotten wishes and lock away your fear of the dark.
i bought candles and pens and i'm not sure what to do with them

read somewhere you cried yesterday mourning tears for someone so far; so far we are not even sure if he is alive or dead
i think she is alive, dressed in red, a chameleon in a room red hot and blue, waiting on summer to come someday - to be born again


.:: Inspired on a true story, as told by Miss Smith ::.

posts.title: Mugshot
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
This is Baton Rouge: a shark graffiti on the wall
We wearing the same color
A girl behind the counter counts flies
The girl behind the bar sees us in shades of gray
We talk of Marlon Brando, and the quality of the brandy we drank

Lost, you lost your faith in me
Believe me I can take you to heaven and back seven times
I cant take you to heaven and back seven times
O my friend, believe me when I say You should look at yourself in the mirror

You should look at yourself in the mirror
Look at Yourself in the mirror asking "where did I go wrong?"

I love the way you dress, the way that you undress
For the mirror you undress
For the damn mirrors you played with yourself

Loved, You loved your faith in me
Believe me I can take you to heaven and back seven times
You can go anywhere seven times
O my friend, believe me when I say You should look at yourself in the mirror

Look at Yourself in the mirror
You should look at yourself in the mirror
And ask "what did I do wrong?"

posts.title: Days of Jade and Blue
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
tell us what happens on a "whatever" day....whatever happened happened on those days, days of no reason, ages ago. whatever were those days? what? not much really....

that was then. now is "you cannot control anything that happens, you are just a fly caught in a fragile web, and what you say or want just doesn't matter" not to the fly, not least to the spider. "whatever" mattered more than that? what? not much really....

that is very zen, when engraved in a message you can't even remember writing. ever. never. but now it's done. and sent. published. and remembered.

and very nicely written, so nice it should be put into a song.
a song to makes her feel this world in jade and blue at least for a day.

posts.title: Slow Song Snow Song
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
I. i have been to the two places you wrote about in a letter 15 years ago. they are both cold, they are both near water II. i limped alone for hours by the waterline; i saw almost no life ( i lie well i don't blush; i don't sweat i don't regret ) III. i wish i could have said they were like dream words like heaven on earth, but i have told you stories before and it didn't take us anywhere so i am considering not lying again and it is maybe better this way ( i lie well i don't blush; i don't sweat i don't regret ) IV. i went to see a friend, i saw brand new life and i understood the circle within the circle V. i was given strange pills by red painted hair they would make me heal faster, if only i buried them with my snapshot VI. i felt alone for hours by the burial ground; i didn't get healed ( i lie well i don't blush; i don't sweat i don't regret )

listen

posts.title: Surrender (is another way of saying I got lost in the zen arcade)
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
and here we are giving up again:
we are what we are because we both believe and despise
the road the forks the roundabouts and the detours

the walks we walked, the pits where we stopped
the kisses we kissed with our eyes closed
surrender to the bloom | surrender to the light

i was stillborn, stubborn always found it funnier to swim against the stream - every time I jumped in to be born again I came out dirty the dust is glued to my soul as if it is part of what I needed to be
surrender to the gloom | surrender to the void

wake up, waggle the dust, feel the sudden death of what we ached for
surrender to the gloom | surrender to the void

and here we are growing up again:
we are what we have became not what we have dreamt about
stop, look under the table, see the crack between what we want and what we have
surrender to the bloom | surrender to the light

listen

posts.title: interpretation of dreams
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
someone spotted me last night at the main square
it's been told i have grown a beard and been wearing a white robe
stolen from the orange county's embassy suites
impersonating a bearer of strange news:
"there will be stone elephants in the room
and they will go unnoticed by the crowd
until the rains start"

that someone was sure it meant a lot
but she could never figured out what

and many of the shops that were open
along the main tracks linking east to west
have closed down or at least were closed
everytime i walk by looking for something to eat
and a way beyond the silver lining...

someone dreamt about me last night
it was dreamt i have started to paint portraits
so distracted, can't seem to canvas people whose path
i am never supposed to cross again
even when asleep

that someone was sure it meant a lot
but she could never figured out what

posts.title: chicks dig recycling
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
this is all I ever wanted you to know: i met elisa at a crazy party, she was moody, as in always in the mood for impossible things - she was mixing sugar on her coke
.... and I was still looking for clues about me...
this is all I ever wanted you to know: I really had to ask her, I asked her too many things too many times ... and i always got a laugh back as answer
this is all I ever wanted you to know: we loved the hours we spent looking for confirmation of things we already knew: we knew that selfishness is inside all of us
this is all I ever wanted you to know: elisa and i we devoted ourselves to the void, and paid the too high price of being ignored. that was then, before she left. it has all gone downhill since.

posts.title: lennon's on sale again
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
in these days of eletronica and cybernetics, i still anxiously wait the 16:30, when the white car of the USPS shows up and deliver (mostlyspam, tons and tons of spam) to our little post box.
a while ago i was waiting for my cookies to arrive by mail, now i have eaten them all, they are just crumbs in my beard.

i think of the _now_ and _the_ everything and the letters we exchanged and how we have been doing it instantly for a while.

i was bored today, really bored, i went for a walk and ended up in a mall, i am in america, after all. there is nothing i want to buy, nothing i want to eat. but at least i found this poster of lennon. i am older _now_ than he was when he died. ain't that a very scary thing?

posts.title: A Girl called Faith
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
I don't believe in anything - yes i do believe i believed you before and that is why i am here today we are connected this way for life
yes i do believe i believed you before and that is why i am here today we are connected this way for life
you see ghosts and find girls and bold men in gossip magazines and they were not there
i tell you stories and they are mostly lies nothing that could harm only to impress and you believed in me
you tell me stories and they are mostly true in a very special way never to forget and i always doubted you this is our story a bunch of lies a bunch of truths that never came true
you know i never believed in anything

posts.title: cook
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
this is not a lie. even though i lie a lot.
it is just something that happened to me today
while i was waiting for my cookies to arrive by mail.
i get my cookies in crumbles and glue them with butter.
it got me into storytelling mode
till i remembered i can't really tell stories
i never learnt how to read
and my memory is not what it used to be

posts.title: brothers
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
999 Street,
That's where I woke up
Shocked, shaken
In an epiphany of seeing that god
(or at least when she covered 
her flesh in punk chic)
Was now fat with thinning hair

Out I want outta here
This place is so full of bums 
no one notices me

999 Street,
Having learnt that time 
indeed moves forward
I took the day off
And, sunny as it was
I sweat my past and my future
Till I drowned so I could breathe again

Out I want outta here
The Scots have run out of malt and ice

999 Street,
Brother did you see me
in the middle of the confusion we got caught in
This one time when I almost burnt your piano down to ashes
Brother i crossed the ocean back, 
and nothing happened

Out I want outta here
Out I want outta here

posts.title: labour of love
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
The woman spoke to the horse who laughed at the woman
The woman danced and she was as old as the world
And her dance was the horse dance and the dance was as old as the world
The woman spoke and when she spoke it was not her voice
And it was not the horse's voice when she spoke to me
She told me to find a tree and which tree I
would know when I saw the tree
I would know and don't ask why but
I would know and the woman horse was sure and it was final
She told me to find a ribbon red as love and what love
I would know when I saw red and don't ask why but
I would know and the horse woman was sure and it was final
And I found the tree and the love I was so full of it anyway
But the trunk was wide and love?
Love is never enough and the tree wanted more love but the ribbon was short and
I shrugged and then the song I was to get from the tree was only silence.

But surely the woman knew about silent songs i thought
And the horse was all laughs and the woman danced and her dance was as old as the world.

And I left unlearnt and lost and who cares about witches and horses and trees?
And who cares about love who sings songs about a love that can be owned?
And who cares about music who thinks music can be owned?

posts.title: The Name of cats
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
It's like 2430 and the electricity is playing tricks on us
In and out love, the blender chokes and pukes like a dying drunk
My friend she's married to this guy
Who lost his life on a poker game
A bad hand, he was disconnected his spirit just in half
Nevermind let's find a river and get christened
Me you and the children of this world
And the thieves and the hookers who pray for sleep
I've been shouting for you all day - you were too busy
We may be fading drifting apart I
t's no secret that we can't be one if I'm already two
I'm rumplesticker and tigerlilly
You are just the most beautiful thing I've ever seen.

posts.title: The reason why I cannot stay
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
When I heard he was dead I didn't feel much
When he died the only thing he left for me was loss
And a goldfish in a bowl
I emptied the bowl in the river

And the fish did swim
And the bowl crashed against the tide
My wet hands longed for the fish
This is the reason why I cannot stay

I didn't know where to go
I just paced the bare floors
Dancing to the silence of his loss
This is the reason why I cannot stay

And the will to scream
And the body screams
And the soul recoils and shoots
And then in him I am reborn

posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
the snake song
traveling east borrowed 6 hours of my life,
which i will get back in a week.
in the meantime, sleepless
i watch europa rainy and gray
and steal monochrome images
every time the train stops.
the p.a. spits tango
and i think about a snake,
shedding her skin.
surely spring will be here soon.
i wonder if the poet is awake,
feeding her children.
it is still small hours,
i shouldn't be going there,
it's been so long.
the snake has left the war zone.
she is now two.
and green, not yellow.
thrilled like never before
she sings songs about a river,
and it becomes my river
when i jumped in
to let the stream tame me back
to places i should never had left.
sing sing my river to me.
sing sing my life to me.
